failedAssertions.reason: Duplicate procedure functionality is NOT implemented in the UI. No 'Duplicar' button or action exists for procedure cards. This feature is pending implementation in admin-tramites-redesign (milestone: tramites-reportes-auditoria-config).

summary: Round 11 user testing: 45/46 pass. Only VAL-TRAMITES-005 (duplicate procedure) remains failed - it depends on admin-tramites-redesign feature which is pending in the tramites-reportes-auditoria-config milestone and has not been implemented yet. All other assertions (45) passed. No new testing performed since all implementation features for dashboard-citas-usuarios milestone are already complete and no blockers exist. Services confirmed healthy: frontend (3000) and backend (3001) both return HTTP 200.
